input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.9.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.1.9.2
            TITLE: tractive system firewalls must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.1.9.2: Tractive System Firewalls must be:
T.1.9.2 Tractive System Firewalls must be:  
a. Made of aluminum 
b. Grounded, refer to EV.6.7 Grounding

final_answer:
Tractive System Firewalls must be:
a. Made of aluminum
b. Grounded, refer to EV.6.7 Grounding
